name: sprint-capacity-planner
title: Sprint Capacity Planner
description: Capacity planning, computed metrics and a one-click next-Sprint button on top of native YouTrack Sprints. No service issues, no locks, no committed scope.

widgets.name: Sprint Capacity
widgets.description: Sprint capacity planning for a project — planning plus manager configuration in one place.

widgets.name: Sprint Capacity Planner
widgets.description: The planner in the global sidebar: pick a project (remembered) and plan — a direct entry point for team members updating their availability. NOTE: the name must differ from the PROJECT_SETTINGS widget's — YouTrack resolves the settings-tab URL by app:WIDGET NAME, and a duplicate name breaks that tab.

widgets.name: Sprint Planner
widgets.description: Open the Sprint Capacity Planner for this issue's project (e.g. from a board card).

widgets.name: Sprint Planner
widgets.description: Sprint Capacity Planner widget for dashboards and the project overview.
